articles.title: Gut bacteria that make serotonin may hold the key to IBS
articles.title_tr: Gut bacteria that make serotonin may hold the key to IBS
articles.summary: Researchers have identified two gut bacteria that can produce serotonin, a key chemical that regulates bowel movements. In experiments with mice lacking serotonin, the microbes boosted serotonin levels, increased nerve cells in the colon, and normalized intestinal movement. The study also found that people with IBS have lower levels of one of these bacteria. The discovery suggests gut microbes could become a powerful new target for treating digestive disorders.

articles.title: Scientists warn Australia’s “zombie tree” could vanish within a generation
articles.title_tr: Scientists warn Australia’s “zombie tree” could vanish within a generation
articles.summary: A newly identified Australian tree has been dubbed the “zombie” tree because it’s alive but unable to reproduce. Myrtle rust repeatedly kills its young growth, stopping the species from flowering or making seeds. Scientists are scrambling to grow disease-free seedlings in protected locations. Their hope is that a future generation may evolve resistance and bring the species back from the brink.

articles.title: ABD-İsrail İran Savaşı'nda son gelişmeler!
articles.title_tr: ABD-İsrail İran Savaşı'nda son gelişmeler!
articles.summary: ABD ve İran arasında uzun süredir devam eden gerilim ve sürdürülen diplomasi çalışmaları, 28 Şubat sabahı İsrail'in ABD ile birlikte İran'ı vurmasıyla sonuçlandı. articles.title: Microplastics may be quietly damaging your brain and fueling Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s
articles.title_tr: Microplastics may be quietly damaging your brain and fueling Alzheimer’s and Parkinson’s
articles.summary: Tiny plastic particles may be quietly threatening brain health. New research suggests microplastics—now widely found in food, water, and even household dust—could trigger inflammation and damage in the brain through multiple biological pathways. Scientists estimate adults may consume about 250 grams of these particles each year, and some can accumulate in organs including the brain.

articles.title: Simple water trick cuts diesel engine pollution by over 60%
articles.title_tr: Simple water trick cuts diesel engine pollution by over 60%
articles.summary: Scientists are exploring a surprisingly simple way to clean up diesel engines: adding tiny droplets of water to the fuel. During combustion, the water rapidly vaporizes, triggering micro-explosions that improve fuel mixing and lower combustion temperatures. Studies show this technique can slash nitrogen oxide and soot emissions by more than 60% while sometimes even improving engine efficiency. Because it works in existing engines without redesign, it could provide a quick path to cleaner diesel use.

articles.title: Şampiyonluk aşkına saldır Bursaspor! Maç kaçta, hangi kanalda?
articles.title_tr: Şampiyonluk aşkına saldır Bursaspor! Maç kaçta, hangi kanalda?
articles.summary:
Zirvenin tek hakimi Bursaspor, bugün deplasmanda en yakın takipçisi Kahramanmaraş İstiklal’le kozlarını paylaşacak. Yeşil-beyazlıların bu önemli maçı saat 13.00’te başlayacak.TFF 2. Lig’in 28. haftasında Bursaspor deplasmanda Kahramanmaraş İstiklal’le karşı karşıya gelecek.

Merkez Spor Kompleksi Stadyumu’nda oynanacak olan mücadele saat 13.00’te başlayacak.

İki takım arasındaki kritik müsabakayı hakem Burak Demirkıran yönetecek.

Demirkıran’ın yardımcılığını Erdoğan Çak ve Erkan Akbak yapacak. Mücadelenin dördüncü hakemi ise Kadir Demir olacak.

Karşılaşma AS TV ve Bi Kanal’dan naklen yayınlanacak.

FARK 9’A ÇIKSIN

63 puanla zirvede yer alan Bursaspor, bu maçı da kazanıp şampiyonluk yolundaki en önemli virajı da dönmek istiyor.

En yakın rakibi olmasına rağmen Kahramanmaraş ekibine 6 puan fark atan yeşil-beyazlılar, bu farkı 9’a yükseltmek ve rakibini zirve yarışından çıkarmayı hedefliyor.

Son 8 maçının 7’sini kazanan 1’inde de berabere kalan Timsah’ta tek hedef galibiyet.

Bursasporlu futbolcular, bu müsabakada taraftarından yoksun mücadele edecek.
